title: fragaria vesca f. helleri
intro: Fragaria vesca f. helleri, also known as the alpine strawberry, is a subspecies of the wild strawberry plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca f. helleri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
